summary: All three v4 findings are properly fixed. IsSetup filter applied at all 4 disk-load return paths in GetAsync and GetByPrPathAsync. LoadFromDirectoryAsync now runs before Setup.RunAsync in Executor.Run2. Setup interception conditional on setup goals existing. Bonus fix: GetByPrPathAsync cache fallthrough bug caught and fixed. 5 new tests bring total to 1490, all passing.
